entry_date.text: วันที่เปลี่ยนผู้ค้ำประกัน

membership_no.text: ทะเบียนผู้กู้

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.entry_date , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no) as member_name , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.seq_no , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_description , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_description , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long( sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno ) as position , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem( sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno ) as group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_perm( sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno ) as member_address , substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live (sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno, sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.entry_date),1,3) as age_coll , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount)::double precision) as loan_approve_amount_thai , pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card ) as id_card , si_security_user.user_name from sc_lon_m_coll_change_head , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , si_security_user where sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.change_doc_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno and si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.entry_id and sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.operate_type = 'CG' and sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_status <> '3' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.seq_no
